creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to jakub_lach from comment #22)
> However, correct loading of linuxkpi_gplv2 depends on firmware and usb
> (either in kernel or as a module), which were missing in my earlier attempts.
Wow, that's certainly are pretty disturbing news!  Unless someone with more knowledge chimes it, perhaps it makes sense to file another PR about this issue.
